boundaries: This contract is not an ESG assurance opinion, SDG certification, regulatory filing, or audit finding.
Derived progress does not establish causality, contribution, attribution, or comparative superiority.
Claims depend on documented sources, method design, indicator definition, and human review.
Validation checks contract consistency; it does not automatically verify truth or source authenticity.

claims.statement: Estimated progress to target for Average monthly bill reduction is 60.00%.

interpretations.text: Average monthly bill reduction changed from 0 USD in 2025 baseline to 18 USD in 2026 Q2.
Progress must be interpreted against the indicator definition, source, method, population, geography, confidence, and review status.

calculation_method.progress_formula: direction-aware change from baseline divided by baseline-to-target distance

goal.statement: Reduce household energy burden while improving residential efficiency.

definition_version.name: Mean reduction in monthly household utility bills relative to the baseline period.

methods.description: Current value is the observed average monthly bill reduction across participating households compared with baseline average bills. Results should be reviewed for seasonality and household-size differences.
methods.name: Before-and-after billing comparison

outcomes.statement: Participating households experience lower monthly energy costs.

result.boundary: Portfolio aggregation combines compatible recorded observations; it does not prove attribution or eliminate double-counting risk beyond disclosed rules.

rules.population_overlap: Population-sensitive sums disclose or exclude overlapping and unknown scopes according to portfolio policy.
rules.unit_conversion: Only dimension-compatible units are converted through the governed unit registry.

measurement_repository.privacy_boundary: The core repository stores aggregate beneficiary counts and dimensions, not individual beneficiary records.
